      Deprecated.
      use OAuth20Service.getAccessToken(OAuth20Grant)
      OAuth2AccessToken OAuth20Service.getAccessToken​(OAuth20Grant grant)

      Deprecated.
      use OAuth20Service.getAccessToken(OAuth20Grant)

      Deprecated.
      use OAuth20Service.getAccessToken(OAuth20Grant)

      Deprecated.
      use OAuth20Service.getAccessToken(OAuth20Grant)

      CompletableFuture<OAuth2AccessToken> OAuth20Service.getAccessToken​(String code, OAuthAsyncRequestCallback<OAuth2AccessToken> callback)
      Deprecated.
      use OAuth20Service.getAccessTokenAsync(OAuth20Grant, OAuthAsyncRequestCallback)
      CompletableFuture<OAuth2AccessToken> OAuth20Service.getAccessTokenAsync​(OAuth20Grant grant)  
      CompletableFuture<OAuth2AccessToken> OAuth20Service.getAccessTokenAsync​(String code)
      Deprecated.
      use OAuth20Service.getAccessTokenAsync(OAuth20Grant)
      CompletableFuture<OAuth2AccessToken> OAuth20Service.getAccessTokenAsync​(String code, OAuthAsyncRequestCallback<OAuth2AccessToken> callback)
      Deprecated.
      use OAuth20Service.getAccessTokenAsync(OAuth20Grant, OAuthAsyncRequestCallback)
      CompletableFuture<OAuth2AccessToken> OAuth20Service.getAccessTokenClientCredentialsGrantAsync()
      Deprecated.
      use OAuth20Service.getAccessTokenAsync(OAuth20Grant)
      CompletableFuture<OAuth2AccessToken> OAuth20Service.getAccessTokenPasswordGrantAsync​(String username, String password)
      Deprecated.
      use OAuth20Service.getAccessTokenAsync(OAuth20Grant)
      CompletableFuture<OAuth2AccessToken> OAuth20Service.refreshAccessToken​(String refreshToken, OAuthAsyncRequestCallback<OAuth2AccessToken> callback)
      Deprecated.
      use OAuth20Service.refreshAccessTokenAsync(String, String, OAuthAsyncRequestCallback)
      CompletableFuture<OAuth2AccessToken> OAuth20Service.refreshAccessTokenAsync​(String refreshToken)
